info.title: BlueCollar API
info.description: Decentralised skilled-worker marketplace built on Stellar.

put.summary: Update a worker (curator). Use POST + X-HTTP-Method: PUT for file uploads.

post.summary: Submit a review for a worker
Send a contact request to a worker

put.summary: Full profile update (supports avatar upload via X-HTTP-Method: PUT)

post.summary: Send a tip to a worker via Stellar

get.summary: List all supported API versions with metadata

post.summary: Generate TOTP secret and QR code

200.description: QR code URI and backup codes

get.summary: List jobs posted by the current user
List job applications made by the current user
List applications for a job (job owner)

post.summary: Send a message in a job thread

get.summary: List messages in a job thread
Get recommended jobs for a worker

patch.summary: Approve or reject a flagged review (admin)

post.summary: Register worker on Stellar Registry contract (curator)

get.summary: List contact requests for a worker (curator)
Export workers as CSV or JSON (admin, 1/min rate limit)
Export users as CSV or JSON (admin, 1/min rate limit)
